payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Partial/edge-cropped view of the upper front of a dark brown varnished wooden cabinet with a molded top rail and vertical recessed-panel doors; glossy finish with visible wood grain and light reflections, appears about 1.0 m from the camera.
